operating_ranges.evidence: Make sure that the fridge is switched on and operating correctly. Check that the temperature is not higher then 3°C

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Only use cooled milk (pasteurised, homogenised or UHT). Check that the temperature is not higher then 3°C
Always clean your hands before refilling milk. Germs can be introduced from dirty hands when opening

fault_conditions.name: lactose_cross_contamination
fault_conditions.description: Cannot guarantee lactose-free milk on tank #2 when using dual milk types
fault_conditions.evidence: If using e.g. regular milk on milk tank #1 and e.g. soy milk on milk tank #2, it is not possible to guarantee Lactose-Free Milk on milk tank #2

maintenance_actions.name: milk_tank_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean the milk tank with soft soap, rinse under running drinking water and dry it

maintenance_actions.name: milk_system_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove the milk tank and store it in a fridge during the cleaning process. If necessary clean the milk tank with warm water and soft soap

maintenance_actions.name: milk_tube_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean the milk tank tube with a damp single-use cloth

assumptions.statement: Milk system uses Electronic Milk Texturing for foam control
assumptions.reason: Component role specifies Electronic Milk Texturing capability but manual excerpts don't detail the electronic control mechanism

assumptions.statement: Milk is frothed using air-only injection system
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Milk is frothed with air only in the one-step system' but doesn't specify pressure or flow rates
